author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 02 - February/Days 039-045 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Surrender to Grace Before Striving into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Seek the Father without polishing the story today; grace receives the whole heart.
edits.reason: Keeps whole-person seeking inside grace instead of performance.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Mercy Speak Mercy in the Morning into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let mercy answer accusation this morning; the Father corrects without forgetting covenant.
edits.reason: Preserves mercy, correction, and covenant memory without flattening the devotional image.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Breathe the Father's Patience into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Breathe beneath the truth today: the Lord is God, and you are His child.
edits.reason: Turns the Deuteronomy 4:39 God-alone confession into a calming reader practice.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Hold Fast to Love Stronger Than Fear into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Guard the memory of God's care today, then pass one testimony forward with gentleness.
edits.reason: Connects guarded memory and generational witness without letting fear lead the tone.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Return to Restoring Compassion into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Turn one gift into gratitude today; the Giver is still the ground of belonging.
edits.reason: Keeps humility and gratitude in the promised-gift frame.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Yield to the Promise That Holds into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Do the right and good thing quietly today; love can obey without performing.
edits.reason: Preserves obedience as grace-shaped love rather than approval-seeking.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Anchor the Heart That Calls You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Walk like one being brought in, not only brought out; the Father's purpose still leads.
edits.reason: Keeps deliverance-with-destination active and personal for the reader.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
